project_metadata.title: 三隻小豬
project_metadata.global_style_prompt: Children's storybook illustration, watercolor style, bright and cheerful colors.

scenes.narration: 從前從前，有三隻小豬兄弟。有一天，豬媽媽告訴他們，是時候離開家，自己去蓋房子了。
scenes.image_prompt: Three cute little pigs standing in front of their mother pig, waving goodbye, in a sunny green meadow, wide shot.

scenes.narration: 豬大哥生性慵懶，他很快地用稻草蓋了一間茅草屋，然後就在旁邊睡午覺了。
scenes.image_prompt: One cute little pig sleeping lazily next to a poorly built house made of yellow straw, sunny day.
